alpha.desc: The view shows a large primary structure surrounded by paved circulation and parking areas|Multiple access routes connect the site to surrounding roadways|Additional developed areas, fenced sections, and rooftop features are visible around and on the structure.

bravo.desc: The view shows the primary structure occupying a substantial portion of the developed site|Paved vehicle circulation and parking areas extend around the building footprint, with multiple access points connecting to nearby roadways|Additional developed features and enclosed sections are visible adjacent to the structure.

charlie.desc: The view shows the primary structure bordered by paved circulation and parking areas on multiple sides|Several driveways provide access between the property and surrounding roadways|Additional site features, fenced sections, and rooftop elements are visible throughout the developed portion of the property.

delta.desc: The view shows the primary structure located within a developed area containing extensive paved circulation and parking surfaces|Multiple access routes connect the property to surrounding roadways|Additional developed features, fenced sections, and rooftop elements are visible adjacent to and surrounding the structure.

nadir.desc: The property consists of a large primary structure situated within a developed site containing paved vehicle circulation and parking areas on multiple sides|Access is provided by several driveways connecting the site to surrounding roadways|Additional paved areas, fenced sections, and developed features are visible adjacent to the structure.
